findings.message: User-supplied input written to database without intended transformation. The post_item() endpoint calls create_item() instead of create_item_normalized(), bypassing the required normalization (strip + lowercase) that ensures consistent casing. This violates the data consistency contract documented in create_item_normalized().
findings.suggestion: Change line 45 from 'return create_item(session, payload.name)' to 'return create_item_normalized(session, payload.name)' to ensure user input is transformed before persistence.
